Keynote Speaker, Dave Delaney

Published Book

New Business Networking

How to Effectively Grow Your Business Network Using Online and Offline Methods. Supercharge the way you build business relationships online and off!

Get the Book

Business success is all about connections, relationships, and networks! In New Business Networking, Dave Delaney shows how to combine proven offline business networking techniques with the newest social media and make them both far more effective. Drawing on nearly 20 years of experience building great online and offline communities, Delaney offers easy step-by-step directions, plus examples from some of the world's top relationship builders.

You'll discover little-known tips for reaching out more efficiently and more personally, great ways to meet your Twitter connections in real life, new ways to build your network before you need it, and make the most of it when you need it.

  • Identify, research, and actually reach your best potential connections
  • Create a personal landing page that builds relationships
  • Grow a thriving LinkedIn network you can count on for years to come
  • Use third-party services to supercharge the value of your Twitter feed
  • Encourage people to engage more deeply with you on Facebook
  • Organize in-person events that work and find sponsors to pay for them
  • Listen and converse better, and remember more of what you hear
  • Avoid oversharing and other social media faux pas
  • Transform your business card into a powerful agent on your behalf
  • Nurture and deepen the relationships you've worked so hard to create
“What I took away from this book was not just tips on networking, but making purposeful networking part of your overall strategy. I know business is about relationships, but I also know that I can do better. Now I've got a detailed plan on how to do that.”
John Morgan, Best-Selling Author and Business Coach
“I love that there are anecdotal stories but also lots of actionable advice and ideas.”
Chris Brogan, New York Times Best-Selling Author and Keynote Speaker
“When I think of Networking, I think Dave Delaney. Why? He knows it and lives it.”
Erik Fisher, Community Manager at Social Media Examiner and author
Get the Book
“Communication isn’t a soft skill. It’s a superpower.”

— Dave Delaney, powered by Futureforth.

  • Coaching
  • Presentations
  • Workshops
  • Contact

Dave Delaney is an internationally recognized keynote speaker, leadership consultant, and communication strategist. As the founder of Futureforth, he works with organizations to improve employee retention, build inclusive workplace cultures, and enhance communication across hybrid, remote, and in-person teams. He speaks on topics such as neurodiversity in leadership, modern communication strategies, and connection-driven team building.

Futureforth

Nashville, TN, USA
